textByHash.28755eb0efdf46223a9729c3c73d910006e7dae2: Ah, a human. Do you know anything about flying?
textByHash.662fd2aedc32fe7e708926755b520b29efd1bf2b: If I could fly, I wouldn't want to do anything else! I'd just fly around all day, swooping and soaring.
textByHash.68357b5792c5ae00fee22c5c8a2c6e925b46fd55: I hope that's what you wanted!
textByHash.7d7814e5286eef565b5a6ee5dd29e224c3e4b721: I'm sorry, but I can't really help you right now. Perhaps you should ask me again later, or try a different camel.
textByHash.94d6cef2dfe6b508a6c5e15611c7d81c39704291: Yes, flying. It's a wonderful thing. I've seen this glider fly, and it's so elegant and fast.
textByHash.c07bced09b02baeb2689815708b062d6dd5f6ee4: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!
